Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Class FireworkBuilder.FireworkEffectBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.FireworkBuilder.FireworkEffectBuilder
Enclosing class:
FireworkBuilder
public static class FireworkBuilder.FireworkEffectBuilder extends Object
A builder for creating FireworkEffects.
